query:
INSERT INTO users (
  openId,
  name,
  email,
  passwordHash,
  emailVerified,
  loginMethod,
  role,
  subscriptionTier,
  subscriptionStatus,
  subscriptionEndsAt,
  createdAt,
  updatedAt
) VALUES (
  'local_zapprotester_001',
  'ZAP Pro Tester',
  'zapprotester@zapcampaigns.com',
  '$2b$12$pydrJKvT.SaUiP0lX4.JG.AhMCQhiul4zuhMMNFPEjVl0hzeZUu76',
  true,
  'email',
  'user',
  'pro',
  'active',
  '2027-04-09 23:59:59',
  NOW(),
  NOW()
);

INSERT INTO videoCredits (userId, balance, updatedAt)
SELECT id, 10, NOW() FROM users WHERE email = 'zapprotester@zapcampaigns.com';
